#03

CAPA module showing seeded CAPA-DEMO-001 (major, DRAFT) and CAPA-DEMO-002 (minor, APPROVED).

#04

Risk Register

UI screenshot

FMEA-driven risk register. QA Specialist raises and mitigates risks here.

#101

AI output · Deviation 5-why scaffolder

AI output

AI scaffolds the 5-why, categorises the investigation (process/equipment/material), and suggests specific follow-ups to raise on the shop floor. Grounded on the deviation narrative. Confidence-gated.

#102

AI output · CAPA RCA drafter

AI output

AI returns a fully structured CAPA: 5-why with citations, corrective + preventive actions (each tagged with owner role + due days), effectiveness check, regulatory clauses. Every claim cites a source.

#103

AI output · Predictive CAPA effectiveness badge

AI output

Shows P(on-time) and P(effective) with top factors. Used as decision-support — appears inline next to the CAPA owner field so Kenji can adjust slack before approving.

audit.program@novex-pharma.demo
#06

All internal + external audits

UI screenshot

Full audit register across the tenant. Each row links to its lifecycle detail.

#07

Suppliers register

UI screenshot

Registered suppliers. From here Priya can open any supplier to see the AI Supplier Intel dossier.

#104

AI output · Supplier Intel (public + tenant)

AI output

Searched 'Sun Pharmaceutical Industries'. Tenant card (blue) is empty — not in the Novex registry. Public card (orange) is rich — openFDA returned registered drugs + recalls, FDA warning letter search returned letters mentioning the firm. Provenance unambiguous.

#105

AI output · Audit Prep Agent (risk-weighted questionnaire)

AI output

AI pulls past findings + openFDA recalls + warning letters + baseline template, risk-weights each section (high/medium/low), flags FDA-visible risks (data integrity, OOS investigation, aseptic). Every question cites its source.

James

Head of QA
qa.head@novex-pharma.demo
#106

AI output · Drift Monitor Dashboard

AI output

Continuous per-feature quality monitoring. Grounded-rate, user-acceptance, latency p95, tool failure rate — current vs 7-day baseline. Alerts fire on drift. This is what keeps AI honest in a regulated environment.

#107

AI output · Deviation Signal Alerts

AI output

The platform clusters recent deviations and flags emerging trends with z-score vs 6-month baseline. Seeded demo shows a cluster on equipment NVX-PRESS-001 with z=3.4 and 3 members. Head-of-QA decides true/false positive.

Marcus

Regulatory Affairs
regulatory@novex-pharma.demo
#109

AI output · Regulatory Impact Classifier

AI output

For a proposed supplier change, AI classifies against 21 CFR 314.70 (US: CBE-30/PAS/annual_report) AND the EU Variation Regulation (IA/minor/major). Cites specific paragraphs. Lists implementation blockers + recommended filings.

Elena

VP of Quality
vp.quality@novex-pharma.demo
#05

Management Review module

UI screenshot

ISO 9001 clause 9.3 Management Review. AI MRM Input Populator pulls cross-module inputs with grounded narrative.

#108

AI output · Management Review Input Populator

AI output

Aggregates CAPA aging + deviation trends + audit program status + training compliance + supplier risk + equipment calibration. AI narrates each section with citations. Returns a draft adequacy verdict and suggested action items.
